home.heroSubtitle: Your trusted partner for quality cleaning solutions
home.servicesIntro: We provide professional cleaning solutions tailored to meet your specific needs. Whether you need regular maintenance for your home, comprehensive cleaning for your business, or specialized move-in/move-out services, our experienced team is here to help. We use eco-friendly products and proven techniques to ensure your space is not just clean, but truly spotless.
home.privateCleaningDesc: Professional residential cleaning services to keep your home spotless and comfortable.
home.commercialCleaningDesc: Comprehensive office and business cleaning solutions to maintain a professional workspace.
home.moveInMoveOutDesc: Complete deep cleaning services for tenants and homeowners during relocation.
home.trustTitle: A Cleaning Service You Can Trust
home.verifiedCleanersDesc: All our cleaners have background checks and verified credentials
home.secureSafeDesc: Your keys and personal information are handled with the utmost security
home.qualityGuaranteedDesc: We ensure high-quality service with satisfaction guaranteed
home.directContactDesc: Get direct contact with your cleaning team for better communication
home.testimonial1: Excellent service! The team was professional, thorough, and left my home spotless. Highly recommended!
home.testimonial2: I've been using this service for months now. Reliable, trustworthy, and always does a great job.
home.testimonial3: The cleaners are always on time, professional, and pay attention to detail. Couldn't be happier!

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your trusted cleaning service partner
about.whoWeAreText1: We are a professional cleaning service company dedicated to providing high-quality cleaning solutions for both residential and commercial clients. With years of experience in the industry, we have built a reputation for reliability, professionalism, and exceptional service.
about.whoWeAreText2: Our team consists of trained and verified cleaners who are committed to delivering outstanding results. We understand that your home or business is important to you, and we treat it with the same care and respect we would our own.
about.ourMissionText: Our mission is to provide exceptional cleaning services that exceed our clients' expectations. We strive to create a clean, healthy, and comfortable environment for our clients while maintaining the highest standards of professionalism and integrity.
about.verifiedCleanersDesc: All our cleaners undergo background checks and verification processes
about.secureTrustedDesc: Your keys and personal information are handled with utmost security
about.qualityGuaranteedDesc: We guarantee satisfaction with our cleaning services
about.directContactDesc: Get direct contact with your cleaning team for better communication
about.ecoFriendlyDesc: We use environmentally friendly cleaning products
about.flexibleSchedulingDesc: We work around your schedule to provide convenient service
about.reliabilityDesc: We show up on time and deliver consistent, high-quality service
about.trustDesc: We build long-term relationships based on trust and transparency
about.excellenceDesc: We strive for excellence in every cleaning job we undertake
about.respectDesc: We respect your property, privacy, and specific requirements
about.contactUsToday: Contact us today to get started

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with us today
contact.getInTouchDesc: We're here to help! Reach out to us through any of the following methods.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messageSent: Thank you! Your message has been sent successfully.
contact.messageError: Error sending message. Please try again or call us directly.

services.pageSubtitle: Professional cleaning solutions for every need

privateCleaning.title: Private Cleaning Services
privateCleaning.subtitle: Professional residential cleaning tailored to your home
privateCleaning.heading: Comprehensive Home Cleaning Solutions
privateCleaning.description: Our private cleaning services are designed to keep your home spotless and comfortable. We understand that every home is unique, which is why we offer customizable cleaning plans that fit your specific needs and schedule.

features.kitchen: Kitchen cleaning including appliances, countertops, and cabinets
features.dusting: Dusting and polishing of all surfaces
features.floors: Vacuuming and mopping of all floors

regularMaintenance.title: Regular Maintenance
regularMaintenance.description: Weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly cleaning to keep your home consistently clean and organized.

deepCleaning.title: Deep Cleaning
deepCleaning.description: Thorough cleaning of every corner, including hard-to-reach areas and detailed attention to all surfaces.

oneTime.title: One-Time Cleaning
oneTime.description: Perfect for special occasions, after parties, or when you need a fresh start.

privateCleaning.whyChoose: Why Choose Our Private Cleaning Service?
privateCleaning.whyChooseText: Our team of experienced cleaners is trained in the latest cleaning techniques and uses eco-friendly products that are safe for your family and pets. We're fully insured and bonded, giving you peace of mind. All our cleaners undergo thorough background checks and are committed to providing exceptional service. We respect your home and privacy, working efficiently while you're away or at your convenience.
privateCleaning.overview: Our private cleaning services are designed to keep your home spotless and comfortable. We offer regular maintenance cleaning, deep cleaning, and specialized services tailored to your needs. Our professional team uses eco-friendly products and proven techniques to ensure every corner of your home is thoroughly cleaned. Whether you need weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly service, we'll work with you to create a cleaning schedule that fits your lifestyle. From kitchens and bathrooms to living areas and bedrooms, we handle all the details so you can enjoy a clean, healthy living environment.

commercialCleaning.title: Commercial Cleaning Services
commercialCleaning.subtitle: Professional office and business cleaning solutions
commercialCleaning.heading: Comprehensive Business Cleaning Solutions
commercialCleaning.description: Maintain a professional and welcoming workspace with our comprehensive commercial cleaning services. We understand that a clean office environment is essential for productivity, employee satisfaction, and making a positive impression on clients and visitors.

features.floors: Floor care including vacuuming, mopping, and buffing

dailyCleaning.title: Daily Cleaning
dailyCleaning.description: Regular maintenance cleaning during or after business hours to keep your workspace consistently clean.

weeklyDeep.title: Weekly Deep Cleaning
weeklyDeep.description: Comprehensive weekly cleaning that includes detailed attention to all areas and surfaces.

specialized.title: Specialized Services
specialized.description: Custom cleaning solutions for specific industries including medical, retail, and hospitality.

commercialCleaning.whyChoose: Why Choose Our Commercial Cleaning Service?
commercialCleaning.whyChooseText: We work around your business hours to minimize disruption to your operations. Our team is trained in commercial cleaning standards and uses professional-grade equipment and eco-friendly products. We're fully licensed, insured, and bonded, and all our staff undergo thorough background checks. We can customize our services to meet your specific industry requirements and work with you to create a cleaning schedule that fits your business needs.
commercialCleaning.overview: Maintain a professional and welcoming workspace with our comprehensive commercial cleaning services. We understand that a clean office environment is essential for productivity, employee satisfaction, and making a positive impression on clients. Our commercial cleaning services include daily office cleaning, restroom maintenance, floor care, window cleaning, and specialized services for different business types. We work around your business hours to minimize disruption and can customize our services to meet your specific industry requirements. Trust us to keep your business space immaculate and professional.

moveInMoveOut.title: Move-in/Move-out Cleaning Services
moveInMoveOut.subtitle: Complete deep cleaning for your relocation
moveInMoveOut.heading: Comprehensive Relocation Cleaning
moveInMoveOut.description: Moving can be stressful, but cleaning doesn't have to be. Our move-in/move-out cleaning services ensure your new home is move-in ready or that you leave your old place in pristine condition. We provide comprehensive deep cleaning that covers every detail, giving you peace of mind during your transition.

features.kitchen: Complete kitchen deep clean including inside all appliances
features.floors: All floors vacuumed, mopped, and polished
features.lights: Light fixtures and ceiling fan cleaning

moveOut.title: Move-out Cleaning
moveOut.description: Perfect for tenants who need to meet lease requirements or homeowners preparing to sell. We ensure you get your security deposit back.

moveIn.title: Move-in Cleaning
moveIn.description: Start fresh in your new home with a comprehensive deep clean. We'll make sure every surface is sanitized and ready for your belongings.

fullService.title: Full Service
fullService.description: Complete cleaning for both your old and new property, ensuring a smooth transition from one home to another.

moveInMoveOut.whyChooseText: We understand the importance of leaving a property in excellent condition or starting fresh in a new space. Our detailed cleaning checklist ensures nothing is missed, and we work efficiently to complete the job on time. We're familiar with landlord requirements and can help ensure you meet all lease obligations. Our team uses professional-grade equipment and eco-friendly products to leave your property spotless and ready for the next chapter. We're fully insured and can provide cleaning receipts for your records.
moveInMoveOut.overview: Moving can be stressful, but cleaning doesn't have to be. Our move-in/move-out cleaning services ensure your new home is move-in ready or that you leave your old place in pristine condition. We provide comprehensive deep cleaning that covers every detail, from scrubbing baseboards and cleaning inside appliances to washing windows and sanitizing all surfaces. This service is perfect for tenants who need to meet lease requirements, homeowners preparing to sell, or anyone moving into a new space. We'll make sure your property is thoroughly cleaned and ready for the next chapter, giving you peace of mind during your transition.

careers.fillApplicationForm: Fill out the application form below and we'll get back to you soon.

orders.noOrdersDesc: Your orders will appear here once you place one.

orders.loginRequiredMsg: Please log in to view your orders and place new ones.

newOrder.title: New Cleaning Order
newOrder.adhocCleaningDesc: Custom cleaning based on your selection
newOrder.bathroom: Bathroom, including cleaning toilet and sink (remember plug), mirror and shower
newOrder.asNeededDesc: Select additional tasks you want done
newOrder.wipingFrames: Wiping frames, skirting boards, doors — so they are always OK
newOrder.limeShower: Lime shower cabin and sanitary — so they are always OK
newOrder.vacuumFurniture: Vacuuming furniture cushions and under cushions — so they are always OK
newOrder.cobwebs: Cobwebs: walls, ceiling edges and windows
newOrder.reminderMove: REMEMBER TO MOVE, FOR EXAMPLE, WASHING BASKET OR OTHER ITEMS, SO THAT THE FLOOR APPEARS CLEAN AND NICE!
newOrder.reminderEye: REMEMBER TO ALWAYS USE YOUR EYE TO SEE WHAT NEEDS TO BE DONE ON DOORS, FRAMES, ETC.
newOrder.mainCleaningExtrasDesc: All standard cleaning items plus these extra tasks
newOrder.insideCupboards: Inside cupboards, where dust and dirt collect
newOrder.woodenFloors: Wooden floors washed thoroughly and polished
newOrder.standardWithout: Standard without bathroom or floor washing (2.5 hours)
newOrder.vacuumAndFloor: Only vacuuming and floor washing (2 hours)
newOrder.bathroomAndFloor: Only bathroom and floor washing or vacuuming (2 hours)
newOrder.largeHome: House over 150 sq m with 3+ rooms (+½ hour)
newOrder.equipmentDesc: Select equipment you want the cleaner to bring

footer.professionalCleaning: Professional cleaning services you can trust
